PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Judith Hehir appeared by telephone for Joanne Lehman (Petitioner).

The Court stated that the matter is on calendar to discuss what an appropriate bond would be, that the petition alleges that there is $3,500,000.00 in real property and $91,000.00 in income, and asked Ms. Hehir what her position is with regard to bond. Ms. Hehir stated that she confirmed with her Client and the Attorney in Florida that the income is actually being paid to the Florida estate, that the will waives bond, that this is an ancillary estate and that there are no creditors to the estate. The Court informed Ms. Hehir that someone from out of State is required to post a minimum bond of $20,000.00 and questions the Petitioner's position with respect to having limited authority, or full authority. Ms. Hehir stated that her Client would prefer full authority, that the property in the estate is a quarter interest, that they are looking to sell the property, but she does not know what is going on with the property and that the property is a parking lot. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition with full authority. Bond will be set at the full amount of $3,500,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for September 19, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
